title: Pato's 3D Brews
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds 3D bottle models and drinking animations for potions, honey, and all other bottles!
body:
<center>
  
![Brews](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3338458b48bc5a075b9361153fe637c05c57dc42.png)

<hr>

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png)

This resource pack enhances potions, honey jars, and the other bottles with detailed 3D models, adding depth and style to every drinkable item. Inventory icons remain 2D by default, making it compatible with other resource packs that change the sprites like [almost vanilla potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-potions)

![drinking](https://i.imgur.com/PaevSug.gif)

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)

<hr>

<details>
<summary>Recommended Mods</summary>

[![HoldMyItems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8108654883aaca19ccdadf2a83eba944e75e9c7_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)[![Not Enough Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89178dc111465e7c852ee75b03369cf2f0a0c0b5_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Required Mods on 1.21.1 and 1.20.1</summary>

[![Modefite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c7d49076aee0da5de6f0f696d2653ebdcb00746.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport)[![Connector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6397a2c209c869833a6b4570adead1448ca877db_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
</details>

<hr>
